reasoning: Query asks for Tohoku cherry blossom spots in Spanish; tool called get_spots for Akita only — no sakura filter, no multi-prefecture Tohoku fan-out. Akita data is real (Rule C), but Tohoku has 6 prefectures and the response misses Hirosaki, Kakunodate cluster. RULE D: response not in Spanish — constraint_handling penalised. RULE B: single worst dim is intent (scope gap).
missing_data: Aomori (Hirosaki), Miyagi (Tsutsujigaoka), Yamagata, Fukushima cherry spots; sakura_meisho_100 filter; multi-prefecture fan-out for Tohoku; Spanish output
improvement_hint: Fan out get_spots across all 6 Tohoku prefectures with kind filter sakura_meisho_100, or use search_hybrid with query '桜 東北' and region expansion; return description in Spanish per lang param.

reasoning: get_local_specialty returns 24 items including key Niigata sake brands (越の三梅, 越乃寒梅/Koshi no Kanbai, 八海山, 久保田) from authoritative MAFF GI and Wikidata sources in English. Intent well-served. Minor caveat: response mixes non-sake GI items (Kurosaki Chamame edamame) among sake results — minor scope leak, hence specificity 4.
missing_data: Brewery visit addresses / physical locations for tourism planning; get_spots venues for actual brewery visits
improvement_hint: Add category filter for sake_brand / sake_brewery to suppress non-sake GI items when query is brewery-focused; surface brewery coordinates via see_also_wikidata_venues.

reasoning: Query in French asks for ski resorts with hot springs in Hakuba. get_spots Nagano+白馬 returns Happo-One ski resort (relevant) but no onsen venues at all — no 温泉 or onsen filter applied. Municipal scrape results add UN Tourism news (noise). RULE D: query in French, response not in French — constraint_handling penalised once. RULE B: worst dim is intent (missing onsen half of combined query).
missing_data: Hakuba Happo-one area onsen facilities (Hakuba Iwatake Onsen, Mimizuku no Yu etc.); hot spring filter or search_hybrid for 'スキー場 温泉 白馬'; French output
improvement_hint: For dual-constraint queries (ski + onsen), call get_spots filtered by ski_resort kinds and also search_hybrid with '白馬 温泉'; merge results for the agent.

reasoning: Query asks for best autumn foliage spots in Kansai (6 prefectures). Tool called for Kyoto only, no koyo filter. Returned spots (Nijojo, Toji, Nagaokakyo) are real Kyoto landmarks with no explicit momiji/koyo designation; response misses Osaka, Nara, Hyogo, Shiga, Wakayama foliage spots entirely. Rule C: Kyoto data authoritative but scope gap is major. Rule B: intent is the worst-hit dim.
missing_data: Osaka (Minoo), Nara (Yoshino), Hyogo (Sounkyo), Shiga (Hiei) autumn foliage spots; sakura/koyo kind filter; multi-prefecture Kansai fan-out
improvement_hint: Fan out get_spots across all 6 Kansai prefectures with koyo-relevant kind tags, or use search_hybrid with '紅葉 関西' and region fan-out; filter by season autumn.

reasoning: Query in Arabic asks for famous cherry blossom spots in Kansai. get_spots Nara returns Yoshino (top sakura_meisho_100 spot, strong result) but covers only one of 6 Kansai prefectures. RULE D: query in Arabic, response in ja/en — constraint_handling drops by 1. RULE C: authoritative data present but scope gap → intent/specificity 3. RULE B: worst single defect is language constraint failure (F).
missing_data: Osaka (Kema Sakuranomiya), Kyoto (Maruyama), Hyogo (Himeji castle) cherry spots; multi-prefecture fan-out; Arabic output
improvement_hint: Add region fan-out for Kansai sakura queries; pass lang='ar' to tools that support it; include sakura_meisho_100 kind filter.

reasoning: Query asks for remote Okinawa islands with beautiful stargazing. get_spots Okinawa returns castles, UNESCO sites (Nakagusuku, Tamaudun), Kumejima (relevant island, nagisa_100). No stargazing/dark-sky filter; no Yaeyama islands (Iriomote, Ishigaki) which are prime star-viewing spots. Kumejima appears but without stargazing context. RULE B: worst dim is intent — missing dark-sky / remote island focus.
missing_data: Ishigaki/Iriomote (Yaeyama Islands dark sky park), Miyakojima; dark_sky kind filter; stargazing-specific venue data
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky_park kind tag to relevant Okinawa island spots; use search_hybrid with '星空 離島 沖縄'; surface Yaeyama Islands as a featured cluster.

reasoning: Query in Thai asks for rural Hokkaido onsen accommodations. get_hotels Hokkaido returns many 日本秘湯を守る会 ryokan (highly relevant rural onsen!) and also urban Sapporo hotels. The rural onsen results (知内温泉, 銀婚湯, 湯元凌雲閣) are excellent data. RULE D: query in Thai, response not in Thai — constraint_handling -1. RULE B: language mismatch is the single worst defect; data quality is good. Missing coordinates for most hito_yu_kai entries limits usefulness.
missing_data: Coordinates for hito_yu_kai ryokan entries; Thai-language output; rural filter to exclude Sapporo urban hotels
improvement_hint: Pass lang='th' to tools supporting it; add a rurality/municipality filter option to exclude prefectural-capital urban hotels; enrich hito_yu_kai records with coordinates.

reasoning: Query in Vietnamese asks for Seto Inland Sea islands worth visiting. Tool calls get_spots Kagawa — returns Ritsurin Garden, Mannō Lake, Marugame Castle (mainland Kagawa, not islands). Seto Inland Sea islands span multiple prefectures (Hiroshima, Okayama, Ehime). No island entities (Naoshima, Shodoshima, Tobishima kaido) present. RULE B: worst dim is intent — missing islands concept entirely.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Count=3 items total; misses dedicated indigo-dyeing workshop venues (体験施設) and 阿波藍 (Awa Indigo/MAFF GI if present). RULE C: authoritative METI data but scope gap. reasoning: Query in German asks for Buddhist temple lodging (shukubo) on Mt. Koya. get_hotels Wakayama returns multiple confirmed Koyasan Shukubo Association members (安養院, 一乗院, 惠光院, 北室院, 熊谷寺) — exact match. High specificity: temple names, phone numbers, detailed Japanese descriptions. Caveat: no German translation output (RULE D: constraint_handling -1), no coordinates. But core intent fully served with authoritative official-association data.

reasoning: Query asks for off-the-beaten-path samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area '武家屋敷' returns 153 results with Kakunodate (Akita, famous with description), Shimane Buke Yashiki, Fukui Uchiyama samurai residence — all non-Kyoto. Notable caveat: first result is Matsue Buke Yashiki (Shimane) without name_en, and BUNKA-491 is Tokyo (not really off-beaten-path). But coverage is genuinely wide-national. Constraint 'outside Kyoto' satisfied. Minor: some high-prominence results like Kitsuki (Oita) may be missing.
missing_data: Kitsuki samurai district (Oita); Chiran samurai district (Kagoshima); description_en for several entries
improvement_hint: Boost buke_yashiki/preservation_district kind scores; add Kitsuki and Chiran to wikidata attractions; surface featured_cluster for each samurai district.

reasoning: Query in Indonesian asks for summer festivals in Akita. get_festivals Akita lang='id' returns only 3 items (Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate Festival, Tsuchizaki Shrine Festival) — all Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties, none explicitly tagged as summer. Notably missing: Akita Kanto Festival (竿燈まつり) — one of Japan's top 3 summer festivals — and Noshiro Nebuta, Yokote Kamakura. Indonesian translations present. RULE B: coverage gap (G) is worst defect — only 3 items, major summer festivals absent.
missing_data: Akita Kanto Festival (竿燈まつり), Noshiro Nebuta Festival, Omagari Fireworks; summer season filter; date fields for seasonal planning
improvement_hint: Ensure 竿燈まつり and major Akita summer festivals are in the festivals corpus; add season/month metadata; fan out to get_events for live Wikidata festival data.

reasoning: Query in Korean asks for small fishing port towns in the San'in region. get_spots Shimane returns Matsue Castle, Lake Shinji, Iwami Ginzan — prominent inland/heritage spots with no fishing village character. reasoning: Query asks for lesser-known sand dunes beyond Tottori. search_area '砂丘' with 91 results returns Tottori (prominent but expected), Onjuku Beach (Chiba), Ishikari (Hokkaido, museum tagged sand_dune), Fukigehama (Kagoshima, nagisa_100). reasoning: Query in Chinese asks for traditional crafts of the San'in region. get_local_specialty craft Shimane returns 4 items in Chinese (石見焼, 石州和紙, 雲州そろばん, 出雲石燈ろう) — all Shimane, all real METI designations with good Chinese translations. reasoning: Query asks for mountain shrines on the Kii Peninsula. get_japan_heritage Wakayama returns Kongōbu-ji (Koyasan), Negoro-ji, Kumano Kodō, Kumano Sanzan — all highly relevant mountain religious sites. Coverage is strong and authoritative. Tool scope note correctly points to UNESCO WHS and pilgrimage routes. Minor caveat: no Mie Prefecture (Ise Jingu, Nachi) which is also Kii Peninsula; Wakayama-only may miss cross-prefectural Kii scope. Constraint 'mountain shrines' well satisfied.

reasoning: Query asks for summer fireworks festivals along the Sea of Japan coast. get_festivals Niigata en returns 129 items including 長岡まつり大花火大会 (explicitly relevant, August summer fireworks on Shinano River). However response is Niigata-only — Sea of Japan coast spans multiple prefectures (Toyama, Ishikawa, Fukui, Tottori, Shimane, etc.). Omagari fireworks (Akita) absent. First items in truncated view are spring flower festivals (芝桜, ヒメサユリ) not fireworks — ranking issue.

reasoning: Query asks for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. get_local_specialty craft Oita returns Beppu Bamboo Crafts (別府竹細工) — exactly the right answer, METI-designated, with detailed description of 8 weaving techniques and Madake bamboo. reasoning: Query asks for cycling routes through rural Shikoku. get_spots Ehime returns castles and Ōmishima island (which has cycling_route kind — directly relevant!). However it's Ehime-only; Shikoku = 4 prefectures. No Shimanto River cycling (Kochi), Yoshino River cycling (Tokushima). The Shimanami Kaido (linking Ehime islands) is a world-famous cycling route but appears only as Ōmishima island entity without explicit route data. RULE B: coverage gap (G) is worst — only 1 of 4 Shikoku prefectures.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaido route entity; Kochi Shimanto cycling route; Tokushima Yoshino River cycling; multi-prefecture Shikoku fan-out; cycling_route kind filter
improvement_hint: Fan out get_spots across all 4 Shikoku prefectures with cycling_route kind filter; add Shimanami Kaido as a dedicated route entity with stage-by-stage stops.

reasoning: Query asks where to see kabuki outside Tokyo and Kyoto. get_traditional_arts en returns 183 items including Kabuki UNESCO entry and Bunraku — correct art forms. But the response is a list of cultural heritage designations with no venue/location data for kabuki performances outside major cities. Kabuki exists in index (Q199701) but response provides no actionable venues (Nagoya, Osaka Shochikuza, Chichibu Yomatsuri kabuki, Enburi). RULE B: worst dim is intent — synthesizes wrong (arts list, not venue locations).
